title: Student finance application forms and notes for continuing 2025 to 2026 full-time tuition fee only students
body: "If you’re a continuing student applying for a Tuition Fee Loan only in academic year 2025 to 2026, you’ll need to complete and send an EUPR1A form.  There are also forms and guidance available to help you change how much Tuition Fee Loan you want to receive and make sure you send us the correct evidence to support your application. "
